description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a rooftop terrace adorned with greenery and outdoor furniture. The exterior is characterized by clean lines, large glass windows, and a mix of dark and light wall finishes. The front entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway and is flanked by tall palm trees, creating a welcoming approach. The backyard includes a spacious patio area, a rectangular swimming pool, and lush landscaping with tropical plants. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back to allow for outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, rooftop terrace, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and tall palm trees framing the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dark exterior walls, rooftop terrace, and the boundary wall enclosing the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, lush landscaping, and the open design of the outdoor living area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional windows, the side entrance, and the continuation of the landscaped garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
